title: More Fixes
description: I'll fix bugs that don't bother me but still bother me.
body:
This mod resolves issue [MC-260949](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/MC-260949) and other minor bugs.

The fix for MC-260949 resolves an issue in which using mods or data packs that alter terrain generation prevented special terrain types, such as Superflat or Amplified, from generating. Now, these terrain types will overwrite customized terrain.

Additionally, several bugs that caused structures to generate incorrectly have been fixed.
- Incorrect generation of well bottoms in plains villages
- Fixed minor issues with outpost construction methods
- Fixed pyramids that were not perfectly symmetrical.
- Various other fixes
